name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Roe v. Wade
body:
#
The Supreme Court guaranteed a woman's right to choose in the Roe v. Wade decision 43 years ago today. This was a tremendous step to protect women's health and to affirm their control of their own bodies.
Unfortunately, since the Roe v. Wade decision, extreme right-wing politicians in states have made it more and more difficult for women to actually access abortion care, aided in many cases by the federal Hyde Amendment and other anti-abortion policies. Nearly a quarter of these restrictions have come in the last five years. This is unacceptable.
The extreme right-wing works tirelessly to make it more difficult for women to access reproductive health care. Republicans in office work to shut down clinics while extremists terrorize health care providers and their patients. Making women travel hundreds of miles, wait weeks for an appointment and face harassment at the clinic door is a national disgrace.
So today, on the anniversary of this important Supreme Court decision, we must affirm not only the right to have an abortion, but we must protect the right to access a doctor or clinic who can perform that procedure.
[**Add your name to mine if you agree we must expand access to reproductive health care and protect Roe v. Wade.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7168/3493946412/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/roe-v-wade?source=em160122full")
We are not going back to the days when women had to risk their lives to end an unwanted pregnancy. The decision about abortion must remain a decision for a woman and her doctor to make, not the government.
We are not going to allow the extreme right-wing to defund Planned Parenthood, we are going to expand it. Planned Parenthood provides vital healthcare services for millions of people, who rely on its clinics every year for affordable, quality health care services including cancer prevention, STI and HIV testing and general primary health care services. The current attempt to malign Planned Parenthood is part of a long-term smear campaign by people who want to deny women in this country the right to control their own bodies.
We are not going back to the days when women did not have full access to birth control. Incredibly, almost all of the Republicans in Congress are in favor of giving any employer who provides health insurance, or any insurance company, the ability to deny coverage for contraception or any other kind of procedure if the employer had a "moral" objection to it. That is unacceptable.
Under my administration, we will protect and expand the fundamental rights of women to control their own bodies. I promise to only nominate Supreme Court Justices who support Roe v. Wade. Our Medicare-for-all plan would cover reproductive health care, including abortion, because all health care is a right, not a privilege. And I would work to repeal the federal Hyde Amendment, which currently restricts the federal government from spending any money on abortion care. That is wrong, and it will be abolished when I am president.
[**Add your name to mine if you agree we must expand access to reproductive health care and protect Roe v. Wade.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7168/3493946412/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/roe-v-wade?source=em160122full")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

**[Contribute](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7169/3493946412/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em160122roevwade")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7116/3493946412/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7117/3493946412/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7114/3493946412/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2d08/43f17890/43e5da63/620e7115/3493946412/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: SCANDAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45915742:JbrQw2rNW:m:1:1349778030:B7522069C094FF77B5D83D9CCAE7B9B3:r)
---
| | | | Peter, This week, the liberal media finally got what it was looking for: the scandalous story that's going to stop Marco's momentum. It's a 1,644 word bombshell from the Washington Post: When he was 18, Marco got caught in a public park after it closed. I'm not going to go into the other embarrassing details (because there aren't any). The problem: Marco is getting an amazing reception on the trail, but many in the media would rather dig up fake "scandals" like this. So we're coming clean about Marco's other offenses. **[Go here to get all the scandalous details:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45915743:JbrQw2rNW:m:1:1349778030:B7522069C094FF77B5D83D9CCAE7B9B3:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45915743:JbrQw2rNW:m:1:1349778030:B7522069C094FF77B5D83D9CCAE7B9B3:r)
---
| Marco's survived $22 million in attacks from the Establishment already, but more is coming. Our opponents wouldn't think twice before putting "Caught In a Municipal Park After Hours at 18 Years Old" on billboards all around Des Moines. Will they send videos of him double-dipping his chips to opinion leaders in key early states? Suffice to say, on top of the revelations that Marco has gotten speeding tickets, and has in the past bought a boat . . . we need your help. While you're here, we've put together a set of custom donation buttons to help our cover-up effort:

It's a national conspiracy -- you don't want to miss out.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45915743:JbrQw2rNW:m:1:1349778030:B7522069C094FF77B5D83D9CCAE7B9B3:r) Alex ConantCommunications DirectorMarco Rubio for President

name: Alexandra
subject: FW: please reach out to Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

Is everything ok?

I know we've reached out to you a few times
regarding Rand's Caucus Takeover Money Bomb and our crucial
Get-Out-the-Vote efforts.

It's so critical we reach this $100,000 goal
by tonight.

With time running out, Rand asked me to
please check in with you to let you know he's really counting on
your support IMMEDIATELY!

Will you please agree to a generous
contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even $10 right away?

Patriot, I hate to be so blunt, but we need
all hands on deck!

If you've already had a chance to contribute,
please don't worry.

Thanks for your constant support.

In liberty,
Alexandra

------------Forwarded message-----------
From: Rand
Date: Wednesday, January 20, 2016
Subject: Please reach out to Patriot
To: Alexandra

Alexandra --

Please do me a quick favor and reach out to
Patriot immediately.

The deadline for our Caucus Takeover Money
Bomb is Saturday, and we can't fall short of our $100,000 goal.

Patriot has been a consistent supporter.

But I haven't seen a contribution from
Patriot yet during this money bomb, and time is running out.

This is so important.

Please touch base with Patriot ASAP and ask
for any contribution possible.

In liberty,
Rand

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Jeb Bush, Jr.
subject: 72 Hour Challenge Update
body:
Friend -- I had to reach out to you with this update:

**As of noon, we have raised $44,428 towards our goal of $100,000 but that means we 're still short.**

[**We only have 36 hours left until the matching challenge ends, so I need you to rush your contribution of just $1 right now before it 's too late.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jtmhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkptsvnq_fngjjryq.html)

**72 Hour Matching Challenge
Goal: $100,000**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ntdhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbtwdkj_fngjjryq.html)

Friend, we only have 9 days left until the Iowa Caucuses, so missing this deadline tomorrow is not an option. We need all hands on deck if we want to win this.

**Remember, until midnight tomorrow, every dollar you give will be matched 100% by a group of generous donors.**

**Please, step up and contribute just $1 right now:**

[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/sccfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgcjmpp_fngjjryq.html)

Thank you,

Jeb Jr.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/glcqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfkwtww_fngjjryq.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: January 23, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
CUP OF JOE

January 23, 2016
Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to recently. Thanks so much for reading. I appreciate your support.

Militaries Stop Problems, Diplomacy Solves Problems

Last Saturday when the news of the prisoner swap with Iran was announced, I went on MSNBC to talk about how the lines of communication opened up through the nuclear deal with Iran led to the prisoner release. Communications -- with the military option always on the table, but at the back of the table -- can solve problems. Militaries can only stop problems. It's how we won the Cold War without a hot war. Click the video below to watch!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I1rILiCnj48

Celebrating the Life and Legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.

Dr. King dedicated his life to not only improving race relations in this country - an ongoing struggle - but to promoting understanding and equality because EVERYONE deserves to be treated with respect and justice.

That's why I was honored to attend the Salute to Greatness Dinner in Flourtown at the invitation of my good friend Judge Doris Smith-Ribner.

I also was honored to be invited by Elvin Ross to attend the Barristers' Association of Philadelphia's Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Memorial Breakfast at the Loews Philadelphia, where I met Phil, who has been the bell captain for 15 years.

Stories from Those We Served: Solving Health Insurance Issues

My daughter's successful battle against brain cancer is what inspired me to enter public life and run for Congress to fight for all Americans to have access to the same level of care that saved her life. When I got to Congress, I made it a priority to not only fight for health care reform, but to help my constituents fight their insurance companies while we were in the process of passing legislation to enhance the whole system.

"He cares for people, and he just wants to help." - Mona Seth, who found herself wrongly holding a $178,000 hospital bill after her husband underwent emergency surgery

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W117JOqdCp8

"There are very few politicians I trust. Joe is one of them." - Edmund Boyle, a father whose daughter survived brain cancer and who I helped get medically necessary treatments

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JVuVDgi09cw

Talking Health Security in Allentown and Doylestown

At events in Lehigh and Bucks counties on Thursday, I hosted roundtable discussions at the Taste of Soul Cafe in Allentown in the morning and Doc Baker Farmulations in Doylestown in the afternoon about policies I will pursue to continue improving America's health care system.

You can read about what I had to say at each event by clicking the news articles to the right about each event.

http://www.theintell.com/news/local/sestak-brings-senate-campaign-health-care-message-to-doylestown/article_09842fbc-bfbc-11e5-8bc8-c78f53e8635a.html

http://www.mcall.com/news/local/elections/mc-sestak-senate-candidate-20160121-story.html

In the Navy, we make sure all our sailors have health insurance not only because it's the right thing to do, but because it makes us a stronger, healthier, more prepared military.

The same idea applies to our nation: improving our nation's health security will create a healthier workforce, contribute to our shared economic mission, and ensure America's continued status as the land of prosperity.

Watch WFMZ's coverage of the event by clicking the video below!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ROghnmVR9w8

Thanks for reading -- and please click the "contribute" button to keep our momentum going!

JoeFacebook: www.facebook.com/joesestak
Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
clean_body: www.JoeSestak.com CUP OF JOE January 23, 2016 Newsletter Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to recently. Thanks so much for reading. I appreciate your support. Militaries Stop Problems, Diplomacy Solves Problems Last Saturday when the news of the prisoner swap with Iran was announced, I went on MSNBC to talk about how the lines of communication opened up through the nuclear deal with Iran led to the prisoner release. Communications -- with the military option always on the table, but at the back of the table -- can solve problems. Militaries can only stop problems. It's how we won the Cold War without a hot war. Click the video below to watch! name: Lois Frankel
subject: this can't wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **BREAKING: CONTROL OF THE U.S. SENATE COULD COME DOWN TO THE RACE TO REPLACE MARCO RUBIO** Friend:

Watching the GOP control the U.S. Senate makes me furious. But there is some good news. **Poll after poll shows that control of the Senate will come down to Florida.**

There is one candidate who has the best chance to turn Florida blue: my friend Patrick Murphy. But with so much riding on winning in Florida, the GOP is going to do whatever it takes to beat him.

That's why I need your help. If you're sick of Republicans controlling the Senate, Patrick needs your urgent help.

[**Can you click here and rush an emergency donation of $5 or more to Patrick 's campaign today?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2260/738133e4/3b731f68/7f83bacc/3475889515/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160123?refcode=pme160123_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Washington Republicans are scared of Patrick Murphy. They know he's the only candidate with the resilience and grassroots support who can win Marco Rubio's Senate seat for Democrats.

That is why they're going to spend big to try and defeat him. We have to stand behind Patrick before it's too late.

[**So, can you click here and rush a contribution to Patrick 's campaign and help him win?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2260/738133e4/3b731f68/7f83bacc/3475889515/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160123?refcode=pme160123_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks for standing with my friend, Patrick Murphy.

Always,

Lois

| | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2260/738133e4/3b731f68/7f83bacd/3475889515/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Rand Paul
subject: They Won't Even Answer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

We have a President who bypasses Congress to
impose the laws he wants whenever he can't get his way.

He intervenes militarily around the globe
whenever he wants -- trampling on the constitutional restriction
that only Congress can declare war.

He simply has his administration bureaucrats
rewrite portions of ObamaCare to suit his fancy. His federal
government continually tramples on the states' prerogatives. His
EPA is destroying jobs every day with draconian regulations.

Yet none of my opponents running for
President will join me in pledging to stop growing federal
government power, and return it back to where it belongs -- to
the states and the people of America?

Patriot, if you support my strong stand, I
hope you'll agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or
more right away.

I believe changing the trajectory of the
balance of power in Washington, D.C. is one of the defining
issues of our time.

After all, as federal power grows, our nation
further runs the risk of investing all that power into the wrong
hands -- spelling doom for our nation.

Sadly, it isn't just President Obama.

The last Republican administration trampled
on state prerogatives with "No child Left Behind, doubling the
Department of Education, Medicare Part D and constant attacks on
the Bill of Rights.

But even despite the fact that past
presidential candidates have willingly weighed in on this
critical issue in the past with a public New York Times survey,
none of my opponents have even bothered to answer this year.

Not only that, but you barely hear a peep
about it from them on the campaign trail.

If it were just Hillary Clinton and Bernie
Sanders, it wouldn't surprise me.

But I'm afraid this shows my opponents
running for President have no intention of scaling back
government spending, size, scope or power.

We can't continue along this path.

As government grows, freedom contracts. It's
as simple as that.

If elected, I will restore the Constitution
of the United States. That means whittling Washington, D.C. down
to size.

That means getting government out of our
lives.

It means setting our nation on a new course
-- where free people are left alone to live their lives as they
see fit, outside of the control of watchful eye of government
bureaucrats.

It's why I ran for the U.S. Senate in the
first place -- and it's why I decided to run for President of the
United States.

And it's why I'm asking for your support
today.

Please agree to your most generous gift of
$20.16 or more today.

Time is running out until the voting begins.
Your support could not be more important.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Marco Rubio
subject: huge news, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923108:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r)
---
| | | | Peter, The past few weeks have been great: At packed events all around Iowa (and elsewhere, too), I've been amazed by the reception we're getting.
Now, you can add one of the most respected voices in Iowa politics to the team: The Des Moines Register just announced it's endorsing my candidacy.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923109:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r)
---
| Just as I've been with every new sign of support this campaign, I'm humbled. Here's what the paper had to say about the meaning of this election: "Sen. Marco Rubio has the potential to chart a new direction for the party, and perhaps the nation, with his message of restoring the American dream." [**If you agree, go here to add your endorsement.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923109:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r)
---
| | [**I Endorse Marco Rubio** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923109:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r)
---
| Voting starts nine days from now in Iowa, and there is no doubt we have the momentum there. I'm going to be all over the state this week to build on today's great news. I hope you'll support me during this final stretch. The establishment wanted me to wait my turn -- witness the $22 million in attacks sent my way the past couple months -- but they're not going to get their way. [**It 's our turn to build a New American Century.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923109:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r) Sincerely, Marco Rubio. P.S. **[Go here to join up with Team Marco -- we want you to be a part of our momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923109:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r)**
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45923110:6Qrsz2rNP:m:1:1349778030:58B1C7E943C11A7AC3A6FCED0963E180:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
